publishedAbstract: ODF: The Rook Ceph Operator will not create OSD Prepare Jobs; Ceph is actively Backfilling and the CephCluster CR has a migration directive. Rook Ceph Operator Logs: ~~~ 2026-07-08 17:52:32.112730 I | op-osd: osd migration is requested 2026-07-08 17:52:32.956417 I | op-osd: waiting for PGs to be healthy. PG status: "cluster is not fully clean. PGs:... ~~~ Ceph Cluster CR ~~~ $ oc project openshift-storage $ oc get cephcluster-o yaml | grep-A1 "migration:" migration: confirmation: yes-really-migrate-osds ~~~ Ceph Status at the time. ~~~ $ ceph-s cluster: id: f3709502-99a7-44fc-b95f-52b7b467fe24 health: HEALTH_OK services: mon: 5 daemons, quorum y,z,aa,ab,ac (age 4w) mgr: a(active, since 5m), standbys: b mds: 1/1 daemons up, 1 hot standby osd: 43 osds: 43 up (since 17h), 43 in (since 20h); 155 remapped pgs rgw: 1 daemon active (1 hosts, 1 zones) data: volumes: 1/1 healthy pools: 14 pools, 2884 pgs objects: 19.63M objects, 70 TiB usage: 141 TiB used, 452 TiB / 594 TiB avail pgs: 3995093/39478735 objects misplaced (10.120%) 2729 active+clean 133 active+remapped+backfill_wait 22 active+remapped+backfilling io: client: 433 KiB/s rd, 146 MiB/s wr, 208 op/s rd, 1.23k op/s wr recovery: 615 MiB/s, 164 objects/s ~~~
publishedTitle: ODF:  The Rook Ceph Operator will not create OSD Prepare Jobs; Ceph is actively backfilling and the CephCluster CR has a migration directive.
